# Git Mapper Examples

## Example 1: Generated Script

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Granular Git Commits Script
# Generated by git-mapper skill
# =============================================================================

set -e

echo "Starting granular commit process..."

# src/__init__.py
git add "src/__init__.py"
git commit -m "[FEATURE] Add src init"

# src/models.py
git add "src/models.py"
git commit -m "[FEATURE] Add data models"

# src/utils.py
git add "src/utils.py"
git commit -m "[FEATURE] Add utility functions"

# tests/test_models.py
git add "tests/test_models.py"
git commit -m "[FEATURE] Add model tests"

# README.md
git add "README.md"
git commit -m "[DOC] Add project documentation"

# Makefile
git add "Makefile"
git commit -m "[CONFIG] Add build automation"

# requirements.txt
git add "requirements.txt"
git commit -m "[CONFIG] Add project dependencies"

echo "Done! All files committed."
```

## Example 2: Conventional Commits Reference

| Prefix | When to Use | Example |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `[FEATURE]` | New functionality | `[FEATURE] Add user authentication` |
| `[FIX]` | Bug fixes | `[FIX] Resolve null pointer in config` |
| `[REFACTOR]` | Code restructuring | `[REFACTOR] Extract database layer` |
| `[DOC]` | Documentation | `[DOC] Update API documentation` |
| `[CONFIG]` | Configuration files | `[CONFIG] Add Docker configuration` |
| `[TEST]` | Tests | `[TEST] Add integration tests` |
| `[STYLE]` | Formatting | `[STYLE] Apply black formatting` |
| `[PERF]` | Performance | `[PERF] Optimize query performance` |
| `[SECURITY]` | Security fixes | `[SECURITY] Fix SQL injection` |

## Example 3: Output Log

```
$ ./mapper_files.sh

Starting granular commit process...

[FEATURE] Add src init
[main a1b2c3d] Add src init
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+)

[FEATURE] Add data models
[main e4f5g6h] Add data models
 1 file changed, 45 insertions(+)

[FEATURE] Add utility functions
[main i7j8k9l] Add utility functions
 1 file changed, 32 insertions(+)

[DOC] Add project documentation
[main m0n1o2p] Add project documentation
 1 file changed, 100 insertions(+)

Done! All files committed.
```
